news.t: TILT Holdings Graduates Public Listing to the NEO Exchange

holdings.infoBox: TILT is an equity ETF with a total of 1929 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.00%, Apple at 4.53%, Microsoft at 2.93%, Amazon.com at 2.42%, and Alphabet at 2.20%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Morningstar US Market Factor Tilt Index Fund (TILT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Market Factor Tilt index. The fund tracks a broad US index with a tilt toward small-cap and value segments. TILT was launched on Sep 16, 2011 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Morningstar US Market Factor Tilt Index

data.title: TILT Holdings Graduates Public Listing to the NEO Exchange
data.text: TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TILT #NEOExchange--TILT Holdings Inc. (NEO:TILT), a global provider of cannabis business solutions, is now trading on NEO.
